Convert a .lss file to a PDF review document

Source: R/lss_to_docx.R
lss_to_pdf.Rd

Same pipeline as lss_to_docx(), but the generated .docx is then converted to PDF locally via lss_docx_to_pdf() (LibreOffice or Word). Nothing leaves the user's machine.

Usage

lss_to_pdf(input, output, ...)

Arguments

input

Path to a .lss file.

output

Path to the .pdf file to create.

...

Additional arguments forwarded to render_lss_docx().

Value

The output path, invisibly.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
lss_to_pdf(
  system.file("extdata", "hesav_2026.lss", package = "lssdoc"),
  "rapport.pdf"
)
} # }
